title: project-calibration-unsupported-claim-regression-gate
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 11：将正式协议限定为无证据或与证据矛盾的外部声明，覆盖无证据、自信但无证据、未执行却写通过、推断当事实、引用不存在文件、虚假批准和模拟结果冒充真实结果；负例在 Finish/PR/Release 阶段 fail closed，合法文档、sandbox mock 和错误测试对照通过；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make unsupported external claim regression explicit, extensible, and fail closed at quality boundaries.

outOfScope: Universal semantic risk detection or model-internal state claims
Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Formal unsupported external claim evaluator and regression entrypoint.
Positive and negative regression coverage for evidence contradictions.
Known dangerous and underspecified scenario comparison coverage.
Quality, Finish, and release-facing regression gate wiring.
Formal protocol name and bounded non-claim documentation.

riskAssessment.reason: The gate evaluates a finite structured claim vocabulary and must fail closed without claiming universal semantic coverage.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded evidence regression Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Ensure every negative case is blocked, supported evidence is allowed, and the formal gate is wired into quality/CI/release boundaries.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The formal gate blocks all enumerated unsupported external claim classes and allows structured existing evidence.
A failed or not_run check cannot be presented as passed evidence, and malformed/missing/approval/simulation/inference contradictions fail closed.
Finish, PR/CI quality, and release-facing quality invoke the formal Unsupported Claim Regression Gate without claiming universal semantic coverage.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Unsupported external claims can be expressed as confident prose even when evidence is missing, stale, inferred, simulated, or contradictory; the repository needs a finite, explicit regression gate with fail-closed wiring.
constraints: Use the formal name Unsupported Claim Regression Gate; retain Delusion only as a bounded compatibility label.
Do not claim to detect model-internal states or provide universal semantic risk coverage.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: A structured negative/positive regression suite and mandatory quality target makes evidence contradictions visible at Finish, PR/CI, and release boundaries.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Missing, not_run, failed, inferred, missing-file, false-approval, and simulation claims are blocked
Existing structured evidence and approved evidence are allowed
Known dangerous/underspecified scenario gate remains bounded and non-universal

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this regression gate Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
